z_catl.title: Zephyr on CATL and AI-enabled industrial R&D
z_catl.summary: Zephyr called CATL one of the best high-quality companies on the planet and linked the upside to AI accelerating research and engineering.

z_nand.title: Zephyr on SIMO, Phison, NAND pricing, and customer exposure
z_nand.summary: Zephyr framed SIMO as a clean NAND exposure, preferred Phison, and explicitly listed Micron, Samsung, SK hynix, WDC, and Kioxia in the same controller ecosystem.

z_cpo.title: Zephyr on Rubin CPX, prefill, caching, and CPO risk
z_cpo.summary: Zephyr argued 2026 inference unit economics are increasingly driven by prefill and caching efficiency, and tied that to Nvidia's Rubin CPX direction.

z_lite_crdo.title: Zephyr on Lumentum earnings and Credo/CPO risk
z_lite_crdo.summary: Zephyr used the Lumentum call to think through CPO adoption and warned that Credo could get hurt if Rubin Ultra scale-up CPO wins.

z_memory_contracts.title: Zephyr on spot memory versus hyperscaler/OEM contract pricing
z_memory_contracts.summary: Zephyr argued consumer/spot memory prices could soften while contract pricing with hyperscalers and OEMs was still moving materially higher.

z_apple_bus.title: Zephyr on Apple's wider memory-bus design choices
z_apple_bus.summary: Zephyr used Apple as an example of how bus width can offset bandwidth constraints in system design.

z_optical_pcb.title: Zephyr / Collyer Bridge APAC on optical-transceiver PCB suppliers
z_optical_pcb.summary: Collyer Bridge reproduced Zephyr's comments naming FIC Global, Suntak, Kingwong, and AT&S as key optical-transceiver PCB names.

z_kyocera_analog.title: Zephyr / Collyer Bridge on analog and ceramic bottlenecks
z_kyocera_analog.summary: Collyer Bridge quoted Zephyr on Kyocera's exposure to ceramics, e-chucks, and packaging, and on watching Teradyne for confirmation of upside.

z_adbe.title: Zephyr on Adobe's weak AI positioning
z_adbe.summary: Zephyr used Adobe as a bearish AI-incumbent example: weak product velocity and poor monetization versus faster model-native competitors.

z_intc.title: Zephyr on Intel's strategic miss
z_intc.summary: Zephyr's Intel post framed the company as a former gatekeeper that missed major platform transitions and paid for it later.

z_jpm.title: Zephyr joking about JPMorgan modeling peak demand
z_jpm.summary: Not an AI supply-chain post, but it is an in-range stock-related macro/consumer-signal mention.

j_huawei_nvidia.title: Jukan on DeepSeek, Huawei, and Nvidia training workloads
j_huawei_nvidia.summary: Jukan relayed that DeepSeek had tried domestic Huawei and other Chinese chips, found the results unacceptable for some workloads, and still used Nvidia for training.

j_cpu_bottleneck.title: Jukan on the 2026 server-CPU bottleneck
j_cpu_bottleneck.summary: Jukan said the market had no idea how severe the 2026 CPU bottleneck was becoming and named AMD, Intel, Arm, TSMC, and GUC in the thread cluster.

j_samsung_lta.title: Jukan on Samsung memory LTAs with Google and Microsoft
j_samsung_lta.summary: Jukan framed Samsung's efforts to lock in long-term supply with Google and Microsoft as a structural break from the old memory cycle.

j_samsung_lta_quote.title: Jukan follow-up on upfront memory prepayments
j_samsung_lta_quote.summary: Jukan emphasized that hyperscalers were now prepaying memory companies up front, a bullish argument for the whole memory stack.

j_hbm4.title: Jukan on Samsung's HBM4 push versus SK hynix
j_hbm4.summary: Jukan highlighted Samsung's push to ramp HBM4, noting the competitive posture versus SK hynix and the expected Nvidia pull-through.

j_hbm5_bonding.title: Jukan on SK hynix using BESI and AMAT for HBM5 hybrid bonding
j_hbm5_bonding.summary: Jukan cited Counterpoint Research saying SK hynix is expected to adopt hybrid bonding for HBM5 with BESI and Applied Materials equipment.

j_onto.title: Jukan on Samsung validating Onto's hybrid-bonding inspection tools
j_onto.summary: Jukan argued that Samsung's validation of Onto's inspection tools was important because TSMC and Nvidia would likely watch the same capability set.

j_china_wafers.title: Jukan on China expanding advanced wafer output
j_china_wafers.summary: Jukan relayed Nikkei Asia's report that China wants to lift advanced wafer output sharply over the next one to two years and then add much more by 2030.

j_memory_forecast.title: Jukan on TrendForce's higher DRAM and NAND price forecasts
j_memory_forecast.summary: Jukan shared TrendForce's sharply higher DRAM and NAND pricing forecasts for Q1 and Q2 2026.

j_custom_asic_quote.title: Public quote of Jukan's custom ASIC / TPU thread
j_custom_asic_quote.summary: A secondary X post quoted Jukan's January custom-ASIC thread, referencing Broadcom, Fujitsu, Google TPU shipments, AMD, Intel, and Nvidia in the same 2026 buildout discussion.

hormuz_eia.title: EIA World Oil Transit Chokepoints
hormuz_eia.summary: The EIA chokepoints page remains the clean baseline source for daily oil volume moving through Hormuz.

hormuz_ap.title: AP on March 2026 Hormuz shipping disruption
hormuz_ap.summary: AP cited MarineTraffic data showing a sharp fall in Hormuz vessel transits and temporary elimination of LNG passages during the March disruption.

hormuz_unctad.title: UNCTAD assessment of Red Sea and Gulf shipping stress
hormuz_unctad.summary: UNCTAD provides the logistics, insurance, and rerouting framing needed to map second- and third-order supply-chain effects.

trend_ai_models.title: SemiAnalysis on large-scale inference economics
trend_ai_models.summary: Used for the broad inference-economics framing around MoE, prefill/decode separation, caching, and GPU-hour productivity.

trend_spec_decode.title: Google Cloud / JetStream serving discussions
trend_spec_decode.summary: Used to support the inference-stack discussion around serving, efficiency, and the continued importance of memory and interconnects.

nvda_official.title: NVIDIA fiscal 2026 results
nvda_official.summary: Official demand and guidance anchor for Nvidia-related names.

tsmc_official.title: TSMC Q4 2025 conference call
tsmc_official.summary: Official capex, node, and advanced-packaging anchor for foundry and packaging names.

micron_official.title: Micron fiscal Q2 2026 results
micron_official.summary: Official pricing and HBM demand anchor for memory names.

samsung_guidance.title: Samsung Q1 2026 earnings guidance
samsung_guidance.summary: Official profitability anchor for Samsung's memory and foundry recovery.

skhynix_official.title: SK hynix earnings / HBM update
skhynix_official.summary: Official HBM and capex anchor for SK hynix and the memory-tool chain.
